title: cyclophorus martini
intro: Cyclophorus martini is a type of plant species in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the 'Martini Snake Root' due to its snake-like roots and association with snake venom treatment. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating snakebites and other poisonous bites, where it has been used to neutralize the venom. The cyclophorus martini plant is valued for its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help in wound healing and pain relief. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots are commonly used to make a medicinal tea or tincture, often mixed with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
